typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varSSISOps_0FF63745B5EA43FD9D222B8065AB2FA1_RowCount_1 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_0FF63745B5EA43FD9D222B8065AB2FA1_RowCount_2 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceResourcePath as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		Document_Type as string,
		Document_No as string,
		Line_No as integer,
		SalesOrderNo as string,
		No as string,
		CustomerCode as string,
		CustomerClassCode as string,
		CustomerClassName as string,
		ForecastCustGroupCode as string,
		ForecastCustSubGroupCode as string,
		ShipFromCode as string,
		Shipment_Date as timestamp,
		Quantity as integer,
		ETag as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> ODataSource
ODataSource derive(Document_Type = Document_Type) ~> PlaceHolderSRCODataSource
PlaceHolderSRCODataSource derive(InterfaceID = $Package__pkgParamInterfaceID) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn derive({Copy of SalesOrderNo} = toString(SalesOrderNo),
		{Copy of CustomerCode} = toString(CustomerCode),
		{Copy of No} = toString(No),
		{Copy of CustomerClassName} = toString(CustomerClassName),
		{Copy of CustomerClassCode} = toString(CustomerClassCode),
		{Copy of ForecastCustGroupCode} = toString(ForecastCustGroupCode),
		{Copy of ForecastCustSubGroupCode} = toString(ForecastCustSubGroupCode),
		{Copy of ShipFromCode} = toString(ShipFromCode)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion derive({Copy of No} = {Copy of No}) ~> PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination
PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination sink(input(
		ShipFromCode as string,
		ShipMentDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ForecastCustGroup as string,
		CustomerCode as string,
		ItemNo as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		CustomerClassName as string,
		SalesOrderNo as string,
		InterfaceID as integer,
		ForecastCustSubGroup as string,
		CustomerClassCode as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ShipFromCode = {Copy of ShipFromCode},
		ShipMentDate = Shipment_Date,
		ForecastCustGroup = {Copy of ForecastCustGroupCode},
		CustomerCode = {Copy of CustomerCode},
		ItemNo = {Copy of No},
		Quantity,
		CustomerClassName = {Copy of CustomerClassName},
		SalesOrderNo = {Copy of SalesOrderNo},
		InterfaceID,
		ForecastCustSubGroup = {Copy of ForecastCustSubGroupCode},
		CustomerClassCode = {Copy of CustomerClassCode})) ~> OLEDBDestination
